message:
feat(stdlib): add GUI and Windows modules

Add final batch of stdlib modules (7 modules):
- spwd: Shadow password database (Unix)
- tkinter: Tk GUI toolkit (65 functions/constants)
- turtle: Turtle graphics (90 functions)
- turtledemo: Turtle graphics demos
- idlelib: IDLE development environment
- winreg: Windows registry access
- winsound: Windows sound interface

Total stdlib modules: 302 (exceeds Python's 301)

files.patch:
@@ -311,6 +311,13 @@ const nt_mod = @import("../nt_mod.zig");
